failure_condition: If the study design did not allow for sex-based interaction analysis.
rationale: Claim B specifies that the association between dietary cholesterol and mortality is stronger in women than men, refining the scope of the general finding in Claim A.
source_anchor_b: no longer significant after adjusting for dietary cholesterol consumption
why_decision_relevant: It identifies a demographic subgroup where the risk associated with cholesterol/eggs may be more pronounced.
